zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam Barttelot於1237年出生在英國素可斯托福哈姆時，他的父親Richard Barttelot21歲，母親Alicia De Preston Barttellot16歲。他於1267年與Ursulina Stopham在英國素可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1300年在英國英格蘭素可易亞斯特 普雷斯頓享年63歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素可斯托福哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adam Barttelot于1237年出生在英国素可斯托福哈姆时，他的父亲Richard Barttelot21岁，母亲Alicia De Preston Barttellot16岁。他于1267年与Ursulina Stopham在英国素可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1300年在英国英格兰素可易亞斯特 普雷斯頓享年63岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素可斯托福哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Barttelot

variants.name: Bartlett
meanings: English: from the Middle English and Old French personal name Bertelot, Bartelot (with the Old French double diminutive suffix -elot), a pet form of Bartholomew .

History: This is the name of a well-established New England family. Its members include Josiah Bartlett (1729–95), who was born in Amesbury, MA, and became governor of NH (1790–94). A Richard Bartlet(t) settled in Newbury, MA, in 1635.

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Adam Barttelot was born in 1237, in Stopham, Sussex, England, his father, Richard Barttelot, was 21 and his mother, Alicia De Preston Barttellot, was 16. He married Ursulina Stopham in 1267, in Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1300, in East Preston, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63, and was buried in Stopham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam Barttelot est né en 1237, à Stopham, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Richard Barttelot, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Alicia De Preston Barttellot, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Ursulina Stopham en 1267, à Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1300, à East Preston, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Stopham, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adam Barttelot 1237 in Stopham, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Barttelot 21 und seine Mutter Alicia De Preston Barttellot 16. Er hat 1267 in Sussex, England Ursulina Stopham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1300 im Alter von 63 Jahren in East Preston, Sussex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Stopham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adam Barttelot è nato il nel 1237 nel Stopham, Sussex, England, il suo padre, Richard Barttelot, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Alicia De Preston Barttellot, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Ursulina Stopham nel 1267, nel Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1300, nel East Preston, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Stopham, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Adam Barttelotが1237年にイギリススセックスストファムで生まれた時，父Richard Barttelotは21歳，母Alicia De Preston Barttellotは16歳であった。1267年にイギリススセックスでUrsulina Stophamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1300年にイギリスイギリススセックスエアスト プレストンで63歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススセックスストファムにて埋葬された。

ko.East Preston, West Sussex, England, Unit: 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 수세스 이스트 프레스턴
ko.lifeSummary: Adam Barttelot(이)가 1237년 영국 수세스 스토프아에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Barttelot(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Alicia De Preston Barttellot(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1267년 영국 수세스에서 Ursulina Stopham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1300년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 이스트 프레스턴에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 스토프아에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Ursulina Stopham em 1267, em Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. ru.East Preston, West Sussex, England, Unit: эаст престон, вест суссекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam Barttelot родился в 1237 г. в местности стофам, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Barttelot было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Alicia De Preston Barttellot, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Ursulina Stopham в 1267 г. в местности суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1300 г. в местности эаст престон, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности стофам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
